server.cfg.info: Primary Team Fortress 2 server configuration. The custom Docker image installs/updates app 232250 and launches SRCDS.
server.cfg.content:
// Team Fortress 2 - GameServerApp managed server.cfg

// Server identity and access
sv_setsteamaccount "{config_parameter id="steam_gslt"}"
hostname "{gameserver.list_name}"
rcon_password "{gameserver.rcon_password}"
sv_password "{config_parameter id="server_password"}"
sv_tags "{config_parameter id="server_tags"}"
sv_lan "{config_parameter id="sv_lan"}"

// Client content and downloads
sv_pure "{config_parameter id="sv_pure"}"
sv_allowdownload "{config_parameter id="allow_downloads"}"
sv_allowupload "{config_parameter id="allow_uploads"}"
sv_downloadurl "{config_parameter id="fastdl_url"}"

// Template-managed files
mapcyclefile "cfg/mapcycle.txt"
motdfile "cfg/motd.txt"
motdfile_text "cfg/motd_text.txt"

// Match flow
mp_timelimit "{config_parameter id="mp_timelimit"}"
mp_maxrounds "{config_parameter id="mp_maxrounds"}"
mp_winlimit "{config_parameter id="mp_winlimit"}"
mp_match_end_at_timelimit "{config_parameter id="mp_match_end_at_timelimit"}"
mp_disable_respawn_times "{config_parameter id="mp_disable_respawn_times"}"

// Team balance
mp_autoteambalance "{config_parameter id="mp_autoteambalance"}"
mp_teams_unbalance_limit "{config_parameter id="mp_teams_unbalance_limit"}"
mp_scrambleteams_auto "{config_parameter id="mp_scrambleteams_auto"}"

// Voice and gameplay
sv_alltalk "{config_parameter id="sv_alltalk"}"
tf_weapon_criticals "{config_parameter id="tf_weapon_criticals"}"
tf_weapon_criticals_melee "{config_parameter id="tf_weapon_criticals_melee"}"

// TF bots
tf_bot_quota "{config_parameter id="tf_bot_quota"}"
tf_bot_quota_mode "{config_parameter id="tf_bot_quota_mode"}"
tf_bot_difficulty "{config_parameter id="tf_bot_difficulty"}"
tf_bot_join_after_player "{config_parameter id="tf_bot_join_after_player"}"
tf_bot_auto_vacate "{config_parameter id="tf_bot_auto_vacate"}"

// Voting
sv_vote_issue_kick_allowed "{config_parameter id="vote_kick"}"
sv_vote_issue_changelevel_allowed "{config_parameter id="vote_changelevel"}"
sv_vote_issue_nextlevel_allowed "{config_parameter id="vote_nextlevel"}"
sv_vote_issue_scramble_teams_allowed "{config_parameter id="vote_scramble"}"

// Performance and logging
sv_hibernate_when_empty "{config_parameter id="sv_hibernate_when_empty"}"
log on
sv_logfile 1
sv_logecho 0
sv_log_onefile 0
sv_logbans 1

writeid
writeip

mapcycle.txt.info: One map name per line. Edit for your preferred rotation.
mapcycle.txt.content:
pl_upward
pl_badwater
pl_barnblitz
cp_dustbowl
cp_gorge
cp_granary
koth_viaduct
koth_sawmill
ctf_2fort
ctf_turbine

motd.txt.content:
{gameserver.list_name}

{config_parameter id="motd_message"}

start_map.name: Starting Map
start_map.info: Map loaded when SRCDS starts. Use a map name without .bsp, for example pl_upward, cp_process_final, koth_viaduct, or ctf_2fort.

update_on_start.name: Update On Start
update_on_start.info: Runs the TF2 dedicated server update before launch. Recommended on.

validate_on_update.name: Validate On Update
validate_on_update.info: Runs Steam file validation during update. Use for repair attempts; it can make startup slower.

extra_args.name: Extra Launch Arguments
extra_args.info: Optional raw SRCDS launch arguments appended after the managed arguments.

steam_gslt.name: Steam Game Server Login Token
steam_gslt.info: Recommended for public listing. Create a Team Fortress 2 token for App ID 440.

sv_lan.name: LAN Mode
sv_lan.info: On is for local-network servers. Off is for internet-accessible servers.

motd_message.name: MOTD Message
motd_message.info: Short message shown by the included MOTD files.

allow_downloads.name: Allow Client Downloads
allow_downloads.info: Allows clients to download required custom maps or content.

allow_uploads.name: Allow Client Uploads
allow_uploads.info: Allows player uploads to the server. Keep disabled unless required.

fastdl_url.name: FastDL URL
fastdl_url.info: Optional web URL for faster custom-content downloads.

mp_timelimit.name: Map Time Limit
mp_timelimit.info: Minutes before the map time limit is reached. Set 0 to disable.

mp_maxrounds.name: Maximum Rounds
mp_maxrounds.info: Completed-round limit before changing map. Set 0 to disable.

mp_winlimit.name: Win Limit
mp_winlimit.info: Changes map when a team reaches this many wins. Set 0 to disable.

mp_match_end_at_timelimit.name: End At Time Limit
mp_match_end_at_timelimit.info: Ends the current map as soon as the time limit is reached.

mp_autoteambalance.name: Automatic Team Balance
mp_autoteambalance.info: Allows the server to balance uneven teams.

mp_teams_unbalance_limit.name: Team Imbalance Limit
mp_teams_unbalance_limit.info: Allowed player-count difference before balancing can intervene.

tf_weapon_criticals_melee.name: Random Melee Critical Hits
tf_weapon_criticals_melee.dropdown: {"Follow Global Random Crit Setting":"1","Disabled":"0","Always Allow Melee Random Crits":"2"}

tf_bot_quota.name: TF Bot Quota
tf_bot_quota.info: Total number of managed TF bots. Set 0 for no bots.

tf_bot_quota_mode.name: TF Bot Quota Mode
tf_bot_quota_mode.info: Normal maintains a bot count. Fill keeps total players at the quota. Match maintains a human-to-bot ratio.

tf_bot_difficulty.name: TF Bot Difficulty
tf_bot_difficulty.info: Difficulty assigned to joining TF bots.

tf_bot_join_after_player.name: Bots Wait For Human
tf_bot_join_after_player.info: Bots do not join until at least one human connects.

tf_bot_auto_vacate.name: Bots Yield Slots
tf_bot_auto_vacate.info: Bots automatically leave to make room for human players.

vote_changelevel.name: Allow Change-Map Votes
vote_changelevel.info: Allows votes to change the current map.

vote_nextlevel.name: Allow Next-Map Votes
vote_nextlevel.info: Allows player votes for the next map.

sv_hibernate_when_empty.name: Hibernate While Empty
sv_hibernate_when_empty.info: Allows the server to reduce activity while no players are connected.
